definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="MCItem" id="item">item</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="arraylist_foreach"><value name="var"><block type="procedure_retval_arraylist"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="1"></mutation><field name="procedure">InventoryHelper</field><field name="name0">copy</field><value name="arg0"><block type="logic_boolean"><field name="BOOL">TRUE</field></block></value></block></value><value name="iterator"><block type="arraylist_iterator"></block></value><statement name="foreach"><block type="variables_set_itemstack"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:item</field><value name="VAL"><block type="empty_itemstack"></block></value><next><block type="item_cooldown_for"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="item"><block type="variables_get_itemstack"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:item</field></block></value><value name="ticks"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">100</field></block></value><next><block type="item_set_display_name"><value name="item"><block type="variables_get_itemstack"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:item</field></block></value><value name="displayname"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">Go away</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>
